Brevo email API
login/password OTPs
temporary credentials

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Reseller portal
Search and filter products
Manage cart quantities
Submit order for approval
Upload proof of payment
Track order status and purchase analytics

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Sales team leader portal
Review assigned inquiries
Approve or reject reseller onboarding
Review payment proofs and assigned orders
Approve, reject, or fulfill orders
View reseller purchases and submit owner report

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Inventory team leader portal
Manage raw materials and quantities
Create products and recipes
Produce batches and deduct ingredients
Monitor stock, expiry, movement analytics
Review inventory-only logs

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Owner portal
View executive sales analytics
Manage product prices
Create owner and team leader accounts
Assign resellers to sales leaders
Review reports and run Prophet forecasts
